nodes.label: BleepSound – shared type for a bleep sound with id, label, url, dataUrl, and audioBuffer fields
nodes.norm_label: bleepsound – shared type for a bleep sound with id, label, url, dataurl, and audiobuffer fields

nodes.label: Actions outside state pattern – playerActions kept outside zustand state to avoid re-renders on subscriber remount
